prompt_en: Cinematic Korean apocalypse opening for CH11 철의 우회. radio mast, cold storage, sea fog, archival realism, delayed guilt. Location mood: 폐 신호소, 우회 선로 분기점, 정비 화차. Show route pressure, practical survival gear, and incoming threat 레일 인도자. Grounded realism, no fantasy.
prompt_ko_context: 증언과 장비를 실은 채 냉기 어린 우회선을 통과한다.
camera_notes: wider negative space, slower pans, distance before impact. Start wide, move into corridor pressure, end on route decision beat.
audio_notes: Base cue echo_base. Layer alarm pulses, crowd pressure ambience, and metallic reverb.
